title: Dragon Mounts: Legacy
description: The Dragon Egg has finally hatched! Let's ride!
body:
![Logo](https://github.com/Kay9Unit/Dragon-Mounts-Legacy/blob/master/logo-banner.png?raw=true) ___ > "A Minecraft mod that allows you to breed dragon eggs and foster them to ridable dragons." > > [BarracudaATA, original author](https://github.com/ata4/dragon-mounts) ___ ### Dragon Mounts: Legacy is the modern continuation of the beloved classic "Dragon Mounts!"
The dragon egg has finally hatched and what resides is yours to raise!

* Explore the mysterious of your new mystical pet and it's connections to the natural world, * Soar the skies and conquer more than ever before, * Utilize the dragons' unique gifts to your survival,
The dragon once ruled, **now you rule _it_**. The choices are endless, all yours to pick from. ___ ![Customization](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/G3EPcczP/images/7e656bc5f9718bdccf3333f2f44a9a6a64a8bd9d.png) # Custom Breeds Dragon Mounts: Legacy is equipped with a powerful system for customizing the breeds that the dragons can be found with. Traits, Attributes, Behaviors, Eggs, Textures, and more can all be customized to your liking! Perfect for themed mod packs.
The system relies heavily on Minecraft's Datapack system and file structures, _therefore no code required_ to modify or implement new breeds! ___ ![bh](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/72eb199b-6c6f-49a4-a702-0e9a823e2abe.webp "Rent a server today") Dragon Mounts is proudly sponsored by BisectHosting! [Rent a server today](https://www.bisecthosting.com/kay9) using code `kay9` for 25% off your first month. Thank you and BisectHosting for the continued support! ___ Special thanks to... * BarracudaATA - Original project; code, textures, ideas. * 13SunRaes - Updated Textures * Kingdomall - Updated Textures * And the many other community members for providing feedback, ideas, translations, and more.
